args: U=(); [ "$(uname -s)" = Linux ] && U=(--userns=keep-id:uid=65532,gid=65532); exec podman run "${U[@]}" --rm -i --network=host -v "${KUBECONFIG}:/kubeconfig:ro,Z" --entrypoint /app/kubernetes-mcp-server quay.io/ecosystem-appeng/openshift-mcp-server:latest --kubeconfig /kubeconfig --read-only --toolsets core,config
openshift.description: Red Hat OpenShift MCP server for multi-cluster administration and reporting
